rows.trigger: A workflow cites quarantine path as active evidence without salvage receipt.
rows.required_action: Stop and create salvage/admission receipt or remove dependency.

rows.trigger: Quarantine item is treated as canon or owner authority.
rows.required_action: Downgrade claim and route through Inquisition.

rows.trigger: Code imports or reads quarantine material without declared receipt.
rows.required_action: Remove import or admit artifact explicitly.
